advisory: BREAKING: JWT/Ed25519 certificates removed. tollbooth-dpyc 0.1.27 and tollbooth-authority 0.3.0 now use Nostr Schnorr-signed events (kind 30079) exclusively. AUTHORITY_PUBLIC_KEY and AUTHORITY_SIGNING_KEY env vars removed. All operators must set DPYC_AUTHORITY_NPUB and TOLLBOOTH_NOSTR_OPERATOR_NSEC. See ADVISORY.md for migration details.
